title: South African President on Trump’s Oval Office ‘Ambush’ and ‘Racist’ Policies
summary_full: In an interview with The New York Times, President Cyril Ramaphosa opened up about the role of middle powers, relations with Washington and apartheid.
summary_public: In an interview with The New York Times, President Cyril Ramaphosa opened up about the role of middle powers, relations with Washington and apartheid.
